hub.gas_desc.en: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
hub.gas_desc.tr: Goal Attainment Scaling עם תיאורים שנוצרו ב-AI

hub.dtt_desc.en: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.dtt_desc.tr: Discrete Trial Training — הקלטה ניסיון-אחר-ניסיון עם קריטריוני שליטה והתקדמות אוטומטית

hub.fcttemplate_desc.en: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
hub.fcttemplate_desc.tr: תכנון Functional Communication Training עם בחירת מודאליות

quick_fill_placeholder.en: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
quick_fill_placeholder.tr: e.g. "תלמידים threw paper during math when asked to הצג work, מורים redirected calmly"

reinforce_step_1.en: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
reinforce_step_1.tr: התחל with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)

reinforce_step_2.en: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
reinforce_step_2.tr: Once התנהגות is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2

reinforce_step_3.en: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
reinforce_step_3.tr: הזז to משתנים schedule (VR) for יותר natural maintenance

reinforce_step_4.en: Gradually increase VR value (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
reinforce_step_4.tr: Gradually increase VR ערכים (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)

record_tip_1.en: Include what happened before, during, and after the behavior
record_tip_1.tr: כלול what happened before, during, and after the התנהגות

quiz_opt_identify_why.en: To identify WHY a behavior occurs
quiz_opt_identify_why.tr: To identify WHY a התנהגות occurs

quiz_opt_any_stops.en: Any behavior that stops the problem
quiz_opt_any_stops.tr: Any התנהגות זה stops the problem

ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.en: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.tr: A break? עזרה? Someone to הקשב? Space?

ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li.en: Add a team note... (Shift+Enter for new line)
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li.tr: הוסף a team note... (Shift+הזן for חדש קווים)

ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.en: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.tr: הוסף context, constraints, or מסוים אתגרים... e.g., "The תלמידים also has a speech delay" or "זה is a middle school תלמידים"

ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.en: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.tr: Any other פרטים (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...

ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.en: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.tr: Describe the scenario you want to תרגל with...

ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.en: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.tr: Describe the תלמידים persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."

ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.en: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.tr: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task התנהגות during math הוראות?"

ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.en: e.g., "Student is defiant and refuses to follow directions."
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.tr: e.g., "תלמידים is defiant and refuses to follow directions."

ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.en: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.tr: e.g. "תלמידים with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "חדש to the school"

ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.en: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.tr: הזן the behavioral מטרות to scale (e.g., "תלמידים will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")

ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.en:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.tr:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What אסטרטגיות do you want to תרגל הבא?

ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.en: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.tr: שתף what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...

ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu.en: 🎯 Target behavior (what you want to reduce)
ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu.tr: 🎯 Target התנהגות (what you want to reduce)

ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma.en: What environmental change will you make?
ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma.tr: What environmental change will you צור?

ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.en: What made you feel this way? (optional)
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.tr: What made you feel זה way? (אופציונלי)

ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.en: What was going on before you felt this way?
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.tr: What was going on before you felt זה way?

toast.added_n_entries_to_abc_data.tr: Added N entries to ABC נתונים!

toast.ai_suggestion_failed_try_again.tr: בינה מלאכותית suggestion failed — נסה again

toast.case_study_complete_review_your_de.tr: Case study השלם! Review your debrief.

toast.dro_interval_complete_reinforce_no.tr: 🎉 DRO interval השלם — REINFORCE! No target התנהגות occurred!

toast.each_phase_needs_at_least_2_data_p.tr: Each phase needs at least 2 נתונים נקודות

toast.merged_n_abc_entries_and_n_observa.tr: Merged N ABC entries and N תצפיות

toast.n_home_entries_pushed_to_abc_data.tr: N home entries pushed to ABC נתונים ✅

toast.name_at_least_one_target_behavior.tr: Name at least one target התנהגות

toast.no_valid_data_found_in_csv.tr: No valid נתונים found in CSV

ui.aisynthesized_behavioral_profile_from.tr: בינה מלאכותית-synthesized behavioral profile from all נתונים sources

ui.avoid_these_frequently_seen_errors_to.tr: Avoid these frequently seen שגיאות to improve behavioral outcomes.

ui.behaviors_can_serve_multiple_function.tr: התנהגות can serve MULTIPLE functions. Always collect enough נתונים (10+ ABC entries) before finalizing your השערה. השתמש the בינה מלאכותית Pattern Analysis כלים for נתונים-driven confirmation.

ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.tr: בחר the right differential reinforcement אסטרטגיה

ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.tr: לחץ "טען תלמידים Workspaces" and בחר multiple .json קבצים נשמר from BehaviorLens

ui.collect_some_abc_data_first_to_genera.tr: Collect some ABC נתונים ראשון to הפק a meaningful packet.

ui.create_your_first_replacement_behavio.tr: צור your ראשון replacement התנהגות plan.

ui.describe_your_research_question_and_l.tr: Describe your research שאלות and let בינה מלאכותית recommend the best design.

ui.document_whether_interventions_are_im.tr: מסמכים whether התערבויות are implemented as designed

ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene.tr: הזן נתונים or record מפגשים to הפק a cumulative record.

ui.family_voices_are_powerful_share_your.tr: Family voices are powerful. שתף your ראשון תצפיות!

ui.generate_a_professional_printready_pr.tr: הפק a professional, הדפס-ready התקדמות report with inline תרשימים, נתונים summaries, and בינה מלאכותית recommendations. One-לחץ PDF ייצא via browser הדפס.

ui.generate_a_unique_scenario_tailored_t.en: Generate a unique scenario tailored to your training needs.
ui.generate_a_unique_scenario_tailored_t.tr: הפק a unique scenario tailored to your training needs.

ui.generate_compliant_iep_behavioral_goa.en: Generate compliant IEP behavioral goals from observation data with present levels, SMART goals, and progress monitoring.
ui.generate_compliant_iep_behavioral_goa.tr: הפק compliant IEP behavioral מטרות from תצפיות נתונים with present רמות, SMART מטרות, and התקדמות monitoring.

ui.generate_tailored_recommendations_bas.tr: הפק tailored recommendations based on the behavioral נתונים and selected audience.

ui.how_often_and_when_to_deliver_reinfor.tr: How often and when to deliver reinforcement. השתמש the Token Board כלים to implement these schedules in תרגל.

ui.identify_temporal_patterns_in_behavio.tr: Identify temporal patterns in התנהגות occurrence

ui.import_student_profiles_or_historical.tr: ייבא תלמידים profiles or historical ABC נתונים from CSV קבצים. Onboard 10-15 תלמידים at once.

ui.no_abc_entries_to_check_yet_start_col.tr: No ABC entries to check yet. התחל collecting נתונים ראשון!

ui.review_your_abc_data_collection_for_c.tr: Review your ABC נתונים collection for completeness and quality

ui.select_a_research_design_to_structure.tr: בחר a research design to structure your נתונים collection

toast_invalid_file.tr: Invalid workspace קבצים — must be BehaviorLens JSON
